text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash is feeling lost without a clear sense of
direction. To get back on track, she speaks to
Tokai Teio, a runner who has had her own fair
share of setbacks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio explains with a smile that she found
her way forward again by asking herself what the
person she admires would do in her shoes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash thinks of her parents, and after some
consideration, she feels more optimistic about
the change in her schedule.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides on a new trajectory and seeks to take
on a challenge even bigger than the Kikuka
Sho—the Japan Cup.
